ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Noodles (64%) (wheat flour, palm oil, potato starch, salt, raising agents (sodium carbonate, potassium carbonate)), Seasoning (6%) (maltodextrin, yeast extract powder, sugar, salt, garlic powder, onion powder, spices, flavouring (contains egg), chicken powder, lovage, paprika extract).
